series_metadata.series_title: OHIO FIRE SERVICE HALL OF FAME AND AWARD FILES
series_metadata.series_description: This file contains documentation regarding nominations and award recipients for the Ohio Fire Services distinquished service and valor awards, the citizens award, the heroism award, the William L. Howards service award and honor roll recipients. It also contains the hardback record books for the valor award and honor roll.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Hard copy of valor and honor roll books shall be transferred State Archives when completed. All other information regarding nominations, except award recipients, shall be retained one year from date of award provision ; Electronic: Documentation regarding a recipient of an award shall be maintained in machine readable format ; Microform: all microform one year from date created
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
